name: Scrapple Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked brown rice or mashed potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the scrapple, cooked brown rice or mashed potatoes, and chopped hard-boiled eggs in a bowl.
2. Season with parsley, salt, and pepper.
3. Shape into croquettes using beaten egg and whole-wheat bread crumbs.
4. Fry in deep fat until golden brown.
